name: otel-demo-frontend
description: Frontend service — AUTO-instrumented via the OpenTelemetry Operator (see ../../operator/instrumentation/nodejs-instrumentation.yaml). Deliberately no @opentelemetry/* dependencies here — see ../../docs/DECISIONS.md ADR-031.
_note_on_opentelemetry_api: This is the lightweight, no-op-by-default API package only (interfaces for reading the active span, e.g. trace.getActiveSpan()) — used solely so server.js can inject trace_id/span_id into JSON logs. It is NOT an SDK, exporter, or instrumentation library, and configures nothing: the actual tracer/exporter setup comes entirely from the Operator's auto-instrumentation injection (../../operator/instrumentation/nodejs-instrumentation.yaml), which registers itself as the global provider this API package then reads from. See docs/DECISIONS.md ADR-031.
